subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the call raised from the direction of the Most Great Prison, wherein speaketh the Ancient King: "Verily there is none other God but Him!" [3.5s]... ...My God, my God! Praise be unto Thee inasmuch as Thou hast guided me unto the ocean of Thy loving providence, and hast aided me to turn unto the horizon of Thy Revelation
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمع الندآء من شطر السجن الاعظم الذی ینطق فیه مالک القدم انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
